title: KTops
body:
kplaceholdersfortopboard is a Minecraft plugin that integrates with PlaceholderAPI to display top player statistics in a customizable format. It supports balance, kills, and deaths leaderboards, and allows administrators to exclude players from the rankings.
#🔧 Features:

Placeholder support via **%kpftb_eco_balance_<1 for example is the writing of top 1>%**,**%kpftb_players_kills_<2 for example is the writing of top 2>%**, **%kpftb_players_deaths_<3 for example is the writing of top 3>%** .

    Real-time leaderboard updates every minute (async)

    Vault economy integration

    Kill and death statistics (via Bukkit API)

    Customizable placeholders via config

    Exclude/include players using /ktop commands

    Configurable formatting for each leaderboard line

    /ktop admin command with subcommands: reload, add, remove

#📜 Commands:

    /ktop reload – Reloads the config and excluded players

    /ktop remove <player> – Exclude player from top lists

    /ktop add <player> – Re-include player in top lists

#🔐 Permissions:

    ktop.admin – Required for using the /ktop command


DC : https://discord.gg/8NWuAyJZRM PATREON : https://www.patreon.com/Kopterhun213
